wordpressPage.title: WordPress Coding
wordpressPage.content:
When I first started building themes with WordPress, I spent a lot of time looking at other programmer’s code. I would find a snippet, pull it apart and learn from it. Rinse and repeat. I learnt a lot from this process, and occasionally still do. Other people will always be finding solutions to problems you have, or problems similar.

 

I have decided to start posting specific snippets of code that I use time and time again for other people to get some use out of them, and learn as I did.

 

All these snippets will be fully documented, so as to provide as much understanding as possible. I will also try to explain how they can be used, give ideas on how to adapt them, and link to other websites that I myself use.
